GateDocument.TextWithNodes: "Coach has dropped a range of cult bags inspired by its archives", "Keen-eyed fashion fans may have noticed when, last September, models took to the Coach runway in New York showcasing a special edit of bags that harked back to the brand's 78-year legacy and yet felt supremely contemporary. Stuart Vevers had snuck some unquestionably cool bags into the Coach ready-to-wear spring/summer 2020 show, which, six months later, are now verifiable must-haves. Known as the Coach Originals range, Vevers has designed a complete accessories selection that fuses the old and the new together in timeless fashion. The collection of bags harks back to the history of the house and include redesigned archival pieces, or 'Remade' items, which means you can snap up a piece of Coach history. Some of these pieces were inspired by designs created by the brand's first-ever creative director, Bonnie Cashin. The 'Remade' range begs and borrows from the house codes, such as the iconic turnlock closure, which finds its home on the Coach Originals Turnlock Shoulder Bag in chalk or emerald green. The Coach Originals Turnlock Curved Top Handle Crossbody bag in signature canvas is one of the range's hero pieces. The iconic patterned fabric is a durable textured canvas that immediately conjures up the very notion of the brand and has a vintage feel to it. If you're more interested in a smaller purse, opt for the Coach Originals Signature C Turnlock and channel your inner '90s style hero. For those who want something more daring, the Coach Originals Zip Geometric Pouch, in Carmine or Chalk, is a contemporary piece that will add a touch of modernity to your wardrobe, while the Coach Originals Colourblock Zip Dome in Jasper Multi will quickly become a statement staple in your wardrobe. "The Coach Originals is both nostalgic and new," said creative director Stuart Vevers of the range, which is firmly one to invest in for the new season. "I wanted to create an experience that is unexpected to celebrate our heritage in a colorful, playful and irreverent way." You can shop the new Coach Originals range here."
